series_metadata.series_description: Contracts concerning the purchase of goods and/or services. Records include, but are not limited to, quotes, contracts, amendments, encumbrances, renewals, non-disclosure agreements, letters of arrangement, and any corresponding documents

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 6 years from contract expiration date ; Paper: Retain while needed, then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
